name: WEED, Inc.
summary: WEED, Inc., an early stage holding company, focuses on the development and application of cannabis-derived compounds for the treatment of human diseases primarily in the United States. The company was formerly known as United Mines, Inc. and changed its name to WEED, Inc. in February 2015. WEED, Inc. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Tucson, Arizona.
